items.text: US carries out 5th straight day of strikes on Iran; Tehran retaliates at bases in Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
Iran threatens to block all regional oil export routes as Hormuz tanker traffic falls ~60% week-on-week
EIA reports surprise 3.0mn bbl crude stock build for week of Jul 3, first rise after 10 weeks of draws
Nat gas at 2-month low as mild weather outlook and Freeport LNG maintenance curb export demand
Fed's Warsh reiterates inflation-fighting resolve; markets split on Sept hike odds after soft June CPI
